content: England's must-win match against Mexico kicks off at 01:00 BST on Monday - disco naps and spoiler-free recaps may be needed.

title: Why are Russians posting horse videos on social media?
description: A new meme is spreading on Russian social media in response to nationwide fuel shortages.
content: A new meme is spreading on Russian social media in response to nationwide fuel shortages.

title: A smartphone ban in English schools is coming into force. What's changing?
description: Schools must now follow government guidance that says schools should be phone-free for the entire day.
content: Schools must now follow government guidance that says schools should be phone-free for the entire day.
